## Specification and section

Which spec (OPI-EPS, OPI-PD, OPI-TRUST) and which section or line is affected?

## Current text

Quote the problematic text.

## Suggested correction

What should it say instead?

## Category

- [ ] Typo or grammar
- [ ] Formatting
- [ ] Broken or incorrect reference
- [ ] Clarity of non-normative prose
- [ ] Example correction

## Notes

Anything else worth knowing? (Optional.)
